top_signals.title: Stocks Stage Cautious Comeback as War Risks Linger: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street traders paced a cautious rebound in stocks as beaten-down chipmakers rallied, though lingering worries about an escalation of the Middle East conflict whipsawed the oil market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Germany welcome in GCAP, but new Leonardo boss warns about timing
top_signals.summary: CEO Lorenzo Mariani said that the advantages of a new partner were extra cash and know-how.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
